original_text:
### Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)
| Gradient | Stops | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |
| Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves |
| Sunshine → 75% Gold | `#faa31b` → Gold @75% | Warm backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds |
| Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
- Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
- Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

relations.note: Adds a logo-placement constraint on top of the general approved-gradient rule for the masthead gradient entry.
Specifies the directional rendering that applies whenever any approved gradient is used in masthead/banner contexts.

quotes: | Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |
| Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves |
| Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds |
| Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |
| Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves |
| Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds |
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

rules.intent: Lock the brand to a closed, pre-approved gradient palette mapped to specific background contexts, preventing unauthorized gradient creation.
rules.rule_text: Only the approved set of five background gradients may be used and no new gradients may be invented: Brand Blue → Dark Navy (#00529b → #011E45) for dark backgrounds/blue masthead/waves; Sky Blue → Deep Blue (#358CCB → #003D74) for blue backgrounds/waves; Sunshine → 75% Gold (#faa31b → Gold @75%) for warm backgrounds; Golden Sand → White → Light Blue (#FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9) for soft light backgrounds; and Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine (#FEF1C8 → Gold @75% → #faa31b) for warm light-to-saturated backgrounds. Gradients are used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic and the LISRAYA logo mark, using approved values only.

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end
Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end

rules.intent: Guarantee sufficient contrast and correct positioning of the logo mark against the masthead gradient.
rules.rule_text: The Sunshine → light gold masthead gradient (#faa31b → ~#ffe05c) is the designated gradient for pairing with the LISRAYA logo mark to ensure contrast; the logo mark must be placed at the lightest end of the gradient.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).

rules.intent: Ensure consistent, predictable directional rendering of approved gradients across masthead/banner placements.
rules.rule_text: In masthead/banner applications, gradients run horizontally, ordered dark/saturated (left) to light (right), matching the approved reference orientation.
